examples: One older colleague cannily took me to lunch and pumped me for information on a topic of mutual interest.
Using simple paper and glue constructions, he creates shapes cannily designed to make us see something that isn't happening.
We have cannily designed a 4-floors apartment for our dearest staff. And one more staff canteen in the dormitory provides all meals.
Cannily, he keeps Mark Isham's score in his back pocket, and reaches for it sparingly.
Because Sony cannily included a Blu-ray player in its latest video-game console, PlayStation 3.
